title: Document Schema
description: Schema for municipal document export entities (reports, letters, or motions).

id.description: Unique deterministic hash or string identifier for the document.

schema_version.description: Semantic versioning string (e.g., 1.0.0) mapping to this contract.

title.description: The title or description of the document.

date.description: Publication or formal tracking date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

url.description: Absolute source URL pointing to the original document location.

text.description: Extracted text content from the document asset, if indexed.
